title: Crispy Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy chicken stir fry recipe with crispy chicken, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add the stir fry mix to the skillet and cook according to the package instructions.
6. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the stir fry mix.
7. Season with Italian seasoning and serve hot.
8. Enjoy your crispy chicken stir fry!
